training_status: experienced (16 years on and off, PPL program)

benefits.description: Lost 7 lbs over 6 weeks during cutting phase while retaining muscle mass. Overall progress from May 2024 to June 2025: 230 lbs to 183 lbs with multiple phases of cutting and bulking.
InBody scale showed skeletal muscle mass increase during cutting phase with 800-900 kcal deficit. Went from approximately 18% BF to 13% BF while maintaining muscle.
Sides/love handles visually smaller. Improved body composition with preserved lean mass during aggressive cut.

side_effects.description: Bad acid reflux from Tirzepatide at beginning of protocol. Resolved through specific supplements and better food choices.
Bad aches reported in first week of Tesamorelin.

protocol_notes: 5mg Tirzepatide bottle reconstituted with 3ml bac water. AOD-9604 injected on love handles. Dosing lower than recommended: 1mg Tesamorelin daily, 200mcg Ipamorelin daily (once daily only). Running total of 8-12 weeks, currently on week 5. Plans to do bloodwork to check IGF levels and another InBody test. Using standardized testing conditions for accuracy. Previous cycle May 2024-March 2025 used Tirzepatide (up to 10mg) for 55-day weight loss phase (230→175 lbs). March-May 2025 bulk phase (175→190 lbs, no peptides, mostly water weight). Current cutting phase started May 2025 with full stack. Diet: 800-900 kcal deficit on 2980 TDEE. Training: 6 days/week PPL program.
